title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss adoption of AI coding tools at scale, covering workflow changes, productivity measurement, and recommendations. DoorDash reports small pods completing nine-month roadmaps in one month, while Atlassian engineers spend 15% of time coding and 85% on other tasks.
